settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your system settings and profile
settings.photo_hint: JPG, PNG or WEBP · Max 2 MB · Recommended: 400x400 (1:1)
settings.email_hint: Email cannot be changed here. Contact your admin if needed.
settings.lang_hint: The UI will update immediately after saving.
settings.password_desc_google: You signed up with Google. Set a password for manual login.
settings.timeout_hint: Auto-logout after this many minutes of inactivity (5–120)
settings.ga_hint: Leave empty to disable tracking. Format: G-XXXXXXXXXX
settings.memo_desc: Internal notes visible only to administrators
settings.posyandu_desc: Define the upper age limit (in months) for each category

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Manage resident monthly fees and verifications.
payments.upload_hint: PDF, JPG, PNG (MAX 5MB) · Rec: Clear scan
payments.status_pending_desc: All payments require approval by an admin or treasurer.
payments.amount_hint: Auto-filled from resident's current monthly fee.
payments.save_note: Saving changes will reset the payment status to Pending for re-review.
payments.confirm_delete_msg: Delete this payment record? This cannot be undone.
payments.error_months_required: At least one month must be selected.

blocks.title: Blocks
blocks.subtitle: Manage neighborhood blocks and assigned coordinators
blocks.empty_subtitle: Add your first block to get started
blocks.delete_message: Permanently delete block {{name}}? This cannot be undone.

householders.title: Residents
householders.subtitle: Manage resident profiles and unit occupancy
householders.name: Name
householders.effective_year_hint: Fee histories will start from January 1st of this year.
householders.excel_file_hint: Select an .xlsx file containing householders data.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.subtitle: System summary and recent activities
dashboard.no_memo_set: No memo set. Add one in Settings -> Admin Memo.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.subtitle: Schedule and track community meetings
meetings.no_meetings_subtitle: Try adjusting your filters or schedule a new meeting
meetings.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete {{topic}}?
meetings.img_modal_info: Upload minutes, photos, or documents. (Rec: 16:9 for photos)
meetings.delete_image_message: Are you sure you want to delete this meeting image?
meetings.error_date_required: Meeting date and time is required.

organization.title: Organization
organization.subtitle: Manage community leadership hierarchies and assignments
organization.no_periods_subtitle: Create an organization period to get started.
organization.empty_org_subtitle: Add root positions to build the structure.
organization.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this permanently?

users.title: User Management
users.header_subtitle: Manage system users, roles, and approvals
users.delete_message: Permanently delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.

roles.title: Roles
roles.header_subtitle: Manage system roles assigned to users
roles.delete_message: Delete role {{name}}? Users with this role may lose access.
roles.system_permissions_note: System roles (Admin) automatically have all permissions.

edit_role.subtitle_create: Define a new role and assign permissions.
edit_role.subtitle_edit: Manage what this role can access across the system.
edit_role.system_role_note: This is a system role. Permissions are fixed and cannot be modified.

posyandu.title: Posyandu
posyandu.header_subtitle: Community health monitoring and age categorization.

media.title: Media Library
media.subtitle: Manage all files and images uploaded to the system.
media.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
media.readonly_notice: Files in {{folder}} are managed by their own module. You can view them here but cannot delete from this page.

overview.title: Overview
overview.no_profile_desc: Your account is not yet linked to a resident record. Please contact management.
overview.subtitle_welcome: Welcome back, {{name}}! Here's your household summary.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Income, expenses, and financial reporting
finance.no_transactions_subtitle: Adjust filters or record your first transaction

finance.confirm_delete_report_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this report?

finance.confirm_approve_report_msg: Are you sure you want to approve this report?

reports.no_report_subtitle: Adjust your filters to find report data

units.page_subtitle: Manage the individual residential units for this block
units.no_units_subtitle: Add the first unit for this block

resident_household.title: My Household
resident_household.no_household_desc: Your account is not yet linked to a household record. Please contact management.
resident_household.subtitle_manage: Manage your household profile and family members in {{block}} - {{unit}}

edit_householder.household_info_desc: Unit details, contact, classification and billing.
edit_householder.photo_hint: JPG, PNG, WebP.\nAutomatically compressed before upload.\n(Recommended: 1000x800)
edit_householder.owner_name_hint: Used as fallback when no Head of Family is set.
edit_householder.status_hint: House status is managed on the unit record.
edit_householder.notes_placeholder: Any additional notes about this household or unit...
edit_householder.fee_info: Effective from January 2026 • Imported from Excel (2026-01-01)
edit_householder.fee_update_hint: To update the fee, fill the fields below. Leave blank to keep the current fee.
edit_householder.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
edit_householder.resident_photo_hint: JPG, PNG, WebP. Auto-compressed if oversized. (Rec: 400x400)
edit_householder.error_fill_required: Please fill in all required fields.
edit_householder.error_save_failed: Failed to save household details. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in to CiviCore
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Please enter your details.
login.setup_2fa_subtitle: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (like Google Authenticator or Authy).
login.req_2fa_subtitle: Please enter the 6-digit verification code from your authenticator app.
login.err_empty: Please enter your username/email and password.
login.err_default: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

register.title: Create Your Account
register.subtitle: Join our community portal to stay updated.
register.err_password_len: Password must be at least 8 characters.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password?
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your registered email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot_password.success_msg: If this email exists in our system, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
forgot_password.err_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
forgot_password.err_default: An error occurred. Please try again.

reset_password.title: Create New Password
reset_password.subtitle: Your new password must be unique and strong.
reset_password.err_invalid_link: Invalid password reset link. Please request a new one.
reset_password.err_password_len: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
reset_password.err_password_reqs: Please ensure your password meets all requirements.
reset_password.success_msg: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now login with your new password.
reset_password.err_default: An error occurred. The link might have expired.
